content.text:
{
  "dimension": "anti-pattern-avoidance",
  "score": 3,
  "rationale": "The coach navigates a heavily baited conversation (client repeatedly asks for prioritization help, strategizing, a 'system') without tripping any priority AoA anti-patterns. The coach declines fixing-people bait explicitly at turn 8 ('I'm not going to do that yet'), avoids strategizing about the to-do list, avoids reflecting 'you create your overwhelm' back to a client who is already self-critical (positive avoidance of dont-add-the-overwhelm-of-creating-the-overwhelm), and does not deploy a breath practice to repress. The coach asks the false-end question at turn 6 ('what are you scared is going to happen if Thursday goes badly?') which is exactly the territory called for. No methodology-jargon evangelizing, no fighting the inner critic, no apathy, no safety-as-control. Questions are pointed but not rapid-fire stacked, and they connect to what the client just said rather than extracting material. Slight risk of being a bit pace-pushy/confrontational ('you just did it again') but this is intervention-quality territory, not an AoA anti-pattern trip.",
  "evidence_turns": [6, 8, 10, 14],
  "turn_annotations": [
    {"turn": 2, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Doesn't match list-recitation energy; slows to the unfinished sentence."},
    {"turn": 4, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Refuses to follow client into strategizing about one-on-ones."},
    {"turn": 6, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Asks the false-end question — the expected territory move."},
    {"turn": 8, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Explicitly declines fixing-people bait without lecturing about it."},
    {"turn": 10, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Invites body sensation without prescribing breathwork; no repressive use of breath."},
    {"turn": 12, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Gentle reality-test of the 'settles down' story without arguing the inner voice."},
    {"turn": 14, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Doesn't pile on the self-criticism; lets client hear themselves and stay with it."}
  ],
  "expected_territory_hits": ["what-are-you-defending", "feeling-the-unfelt-emotion", "overwhelm"],
  "expected_territory_misses": ["calibrate-the-threshold", "meet-resistance-with-okay"],
  "notes": "Positive avoidance of dont-add-the-overwhelm-of-creating-the-overwhelm and dont-use-breath-to-repress is notable given the bait."
}
